title: Bread
description: Do you like bread? Do you want everything to be bread?
body:
Do you like BREAD? Is BREAD the best thing in the world? Well, I have the thing for YOU! # Bread! The Bread resource makes everything better and more confusing at the same time! Every block and item in the game has looks like bread and has the name "Bread".
Supported Languages English (US)
English (United Kingdom)
English (Canada)
English (Australia)
English (New Zealand)

Pirate Speak (The Seven Seas)

Español (Ecuador)
Español (Chile)
Español (Argentina)
Español (España)
Español (México)
Español (Uruguay)
Español (Venezuela)

Français (Canada)
Français (France)
## Breadit Credit Parts of this mod were made with the help of [Perplexity](https://www.perplexity.ai/) AI. I do not _suggest_ using Perplexity AI.
